allow: PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Ollama WSL Access" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 11434 -Action Allow -Profile Any -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Remove-Item -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.wslconfig" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; wsl --shutdown; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; wsl --status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd /mnt/f/IA/Anonymisation && conda run -n ano python -c 'from eval.evaluate import _build_config; print\(\\"import OK\\"\)' 2>&1")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c "source /root/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate ano && cd /mnt/f/IA/Anonymisation && python -c 'from eval.evaluate import _build_config; print\(\\"import OK\\"\)' 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "find /home -name 'conda.sh' 2>/dev/null | head -5; find /opt -name 'conda.sh' 2>/dev/null | head -5; which python3 2>/dev/null")
